stimulus:
Welcome to the False Recall experiment.

Press any key to begin.

Listen to the following words. Do your best to memorize as many words as accurately as possible.

The first trial will begin after this screen

Press any key to continue

You will now receive another test.

Here you will be shown a series of words that you may have seen previously.

Your task is to rate your confidence of seeing these words on a 4 point scale

Definitely new

Maybe new

Maybe seen before

Definitely seen before

Press any key to continue

Speed Memory Game

Press S if the word was studied.

Press N if it was NOT studied.

Respond as quickly as possible. (Please note it may be case sensitive)

Press any key to begin.

Game Results

Accuracy: 61%

Average RT: 1858 ms

Press any key to continue.

response: {"Q0":"seeing if people's brains will recall related words that weren't presented ","Q1":"someone behind me is shaking their chair incredibly distractingly","Q2":"tasks were moderate.","Q3":"didn't realize that \"case-sensitive\" meant that I had to type in the capital letters for S and N until I was through several trials.\nThe first trial also started with my volume all the way down, even though I checked it prior to clicking start. I was confused and missed a few words because of it.","Q4":"no"}
